mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_task ( project_id, assigner_id, assignee_id, task_name, task_description, deadline, status, del_flag, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{assignerId}, #{assigneeId}, #{taskName}, #{taskDescription}, #{deadline}, 0, 0, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM project_task WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE project_task SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND del_flag = 0
mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.project_id AS projectId, t.task_name AS taskName, t.task_description AS taskDescription, t.deadline, t.status, t.assigner_id AS assignerId, t.assignee_id AS assigneeId, t.create_time AS createTime, t.update_time AS updateTime, u1.real_name AS assignerName, u2.real_name AS assigneeName, -- 动态计算是否逾期：截止时间小于当前时间，且状态未完成(不等于2) 时为逾期 IF(t.deadline < NOW() AND t.status != 2, TRUE, FALSE) AS isOverdue FROM project_task t LEFT JOIN sys_user u1 ON t.assigner_id = u1.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u2 ON t.assignee_id = u2.id WHERE t.project_id = #{projectId} AND t.del_flag = 0 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
